name: @stackra/collaboration
purpose: Liveblocks-style real-time collaboration — presence, cursors, threads, shared state, and notifications with pluggable transports.
capabilities: Comment threads scoped to any entity
Shared CRDT-style state with conflict resolution
when_to_use: Adding multiplayer presence, cursors, or shared comments to a client surface.
when_not_to_use: For plain event pub/sub use @stackra/realtime directly; for local UI state use @stackra/state.
